{"step_by_step_thinking": "Serum ferritin is the most sensitive test for detecting iron depletion in pregnancy. The documents mention that serum ferritin is the first marker to become low in iron deficiency and is more sensitive than transferrin in diagnosing iron deficiency anemia. Additionally, serum ferritin directly correlates to total body iron stores, making it a reliable indicator of iron status.", "answer_choice": "B"}
